name: analytics-python

metadata.name: analytics-python
metadata.summary: The hassle-free way to integrate analytics into any python application.

documentation:
This library was renamed due to a naming conflict with an official python library. 
Please use the new listing at https://pypi.org/project/segment-analytics-python/

Segment is the simplest way to integrate analytics into your application.
One API allows you to turn on any other analytics service. No more learning
new APIs, repeated code, and wasted development time.

This is the official python client that wraps the Segment REST API (https://segment.com).

Documentation and more details at https://github.com/segmentio/analytics-python

methods.name: analytics.test.module.TestModule.setUp
documentation: def failed(self):
self.failed = True

documentation: Mark the failure handler

documentation: Determines if a given datetime.datetime is naive.

functions.name: analytics.utils.total_seconds
documentation: Determines total seconds with python < 2.7 compat.

functions.name: analytics.utils.guess_timezone
documentation: Attempts to convert a naive datetime to an aware datetime.

functions.name: analytics.request.post
documentation: Post the `kwargs` to the API

documentation: Create a consumer thread.

documentation: Runs the consumer.

methods.name: analytics.consumer.Consumer.pause
documentation: Pause the consumer.

methods.name: analytics.consumer.Consumer.upload
documentation: Upload the next batch of items, return whether successful.

methods.name: analytics.consumer.Consumer.next
documentation: Return the next batch of items to upload.

methods.name: analytics.consumer.Consumer.request
documentation: Attempt to upload the batch and retry before raising an error
Consumes the messages from the client's queue.

documentation: Require that the named `field` has the right `data_type`

methods.name: analytics.client.Client._enqueue
documentation: Push a new `msg` onto the queue, return `(success, msg)`

methods.name: analytics.client.Client.flush
documentation: Forces a flush from the internal queue to the server

methods.name: analytics.client.Client.join
documentation:
Ends the consumer thread once the queue is empty.
Blocks execution until finished

methods.name: analytics.client.Client.shutdown
documentation: Flush all messages and cleanly shutdown the client
